notes: dodge.com consumer site. The 2026 lineup splits into 3 models: Charger Daytona (BEV, both coupe and sedan bodies), Charger Sixpack (ICE 3.0L twin-turbo I6, both coupe and sedan bodies), and Durango (3-row SUV with V8 powertrains incl. final-MY Hellcat). Charger Daytona EV and Charger Sixpack ICE share the same dodge.com/charger.html page (Stellantis lists them as one nameplate); slug-variants below differentiate. Fallback CDN: s3.amazonaws.com/chryslermedia.iconicweb.com via Stellantis press if dodge.com WebFetch is gated.
